Part 3 of #2583
To allow easy testing of part 2 of #2583 (also #2542)

vllm.title: [Model] Remove hardcoded image tokens ids from Pixtral
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Thanks to @patrickvonplaten and the Mistral AI team, now we can retrieve these values from the model config (params.json). This PR updates the model file to remove the previously hardcoded token IDs.
Tested with mistralai/Pixtral-12B-2409 and mistralai/Pixtral-Large-Instruct-2411.

vllm.title: [Hardware][AMD]: Replace HIPCC version with more precise ROCm version
vllm.author: kairos-yu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Hi all, Ifound that the representation of the ROCm version is somewhat unclear. For instance, in the case of the current ROCm version 6.2.0, the version specified in setup.py is 624, which corresponds to the HIPCC version. To represent the ROCm version more accurately, I opted to utilize the version
